Two families on the east side stopped trading with each other and their people are choosing sides
A disagreement over water rights turned into a shouting match at the council and neither side backed down
The smith and the mason had a falling out over a shared apprentice and now neither will work on the same project
Someone accused the grain keeper of skimming from the stores and the accusation has split the council
A land boundary that was settled years ago got challenged again and both claimants are refusing arbitration
The old trade agreement with the neighboring settlement fell apart and both sides blame the other
A group of residents blocked the road in protest over the new labor levy and the guards had to intervene

Two council members have been undermining each other's proposals for weeks and nothing is getting decided
A broken betrothal between two prominent families has turned into a feud that is pulling in their neighbors

Someone spread a rumor about the watch captain taking bribes and now nobody trusts the night patrol
